name: Burke’s Bar and Grill
description: Burke’s Bar and Grill is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fallon, NV. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. Amenities include water and restrooms.

name: Fallon City-County Gym
description: Fallon City-County Gym is a place to play pickleball in Fallon, NV. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Oats park
description: Come play pickleball at Oats park in Fallon, NV! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, lights, and water. The courts are free.
